title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Disaster strikes after Bulbul unwittingly consumes an intoxicant during the Holi festivities, and Veer is shattered when Bulbul blurts out the truth in a drunken state.

title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Disaster strikes after Bulbul unwittingly consumes an intoxicant during the Holi festivities, and Veer is shattered when Bulbul blurts out the truth in a drunken state.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rajeev mentions that he is only at the venue for Parineet, and he later apologises to Neeti after informing her about his wedding to Parineet.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Kareena orders her followers to lock Soumya up after she became the Guru Maa. Saya thinks Kareena is abusing her power and intervenes.

title: Jai Jagannath
subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new trike, and Marshall proves he is a true hero when he puts out a fire on the beach.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble saves Jake from an avalanche, receives his vehicle, and becomes a member of the PAW Patrol. The Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Wally the Walrus is tangled in an old fishing net.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: An alien spaceship crash lands at Farmer Yumi's. Now it's up to the gang to help out the stranded little extraterrestrial by fixing his ship and getting him back to his home planet.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Jake and Everest are excited about the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When a storm blows through the town right before a concert, the pups must work together to clean up the mess; Mayor Goodway's backpack slips down the side of a cliff with Chickaletta in it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must chase down Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew when they steal gold discovered in Adventure Bay. Mayor Humdinger orders the Kit-tastrophe Crew to steal the Paw Patroller.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder investigates when jets of water start springing up all over town. The PAW Patrol helps a rancher find a spooked horse.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Best friends Motu and Patlu live in Furfuri Nagar. When they land in the most hilarious situations, Motu is the one who generally creates problems, while Patlu tries to solve them.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Motu learns forgiveness, but his newfound tolerance sets a dangerous thief free. Can he make up for his mistake?

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Aditya and Bharti speak bitter truths out loud. Later, Harsh sends Aditya out on the street to interview people and gives him hilarious instructions.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: Sujata leaves Simar the responsibility to care for Prem while he is ill. Prem refuses all help from Simar even though she tries to help him. He sleeps on the sofa in spite of his weakened state.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Kareena tells Preeto about her plan, making her to be worried about the family. Soumya talks to Harman about his connection with Surbhi.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Forced to marry a rich, shrewd politician, kind-hearted Suman adjusts to her new reality whilst dealing with a sister-in-law who harbours ambitions of being the head of the household.

subTitle: Influenced by recent developments, Rajeev accepts Parineet as his wife, leaving Parineet elated by his decision.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble is pretending to be a super pup but gets himself in trouble. When Ryder's Robot Pup breaks and starts going wild around Adventure Bay, it takes the whole PAW Patrol to help Ryder find it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are led on a wild chase. During a bad windstorm, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save an Owl trapped in a blown over tree and reunite her with her baby.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must invade the Spider King's lair to rescue Apollo. Ryder and the others must rebuild a trapeze before a show.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mr Porter's van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore, and Katie and her cat are on a stranded chair lift, leaving them with no way down.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rajeev gets into an awkward situation when the water runs out during his shower, and he calls for help. Parineet feels uncomfortable walking into the bathroom to give him the water but does it anyway. What will happen next?

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat. Adventure Bay's newest dolphin pup accidentally swims into a shallow-water stream.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups get a new 18-wheeler mobile lookout. Just in time too, when Jake ends up lost in the south pole. He gets some extra help from a new friend, a pup called Everest.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Marshall must head out for a rescue on his own when Katie calls with an emergency, and the PAW Patrol must rescue a family of deer who are stuck on the slippery ice.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mayor Goodway asks the PAW Patrol to rescue her twin niece and nephew from a tree. Mayor Goodway receives a package of piglets instead of the fireworks she was expecting.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Wally's special friend, Walinda, gets tangled in an anchor chain. Cap'n Turbot and his cousin are in the middle of an archaeological dig when the cliff they are on collapses all around them.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Rubble finds an old, brass jack-in-the-box with a genie inside who grants him three wishes. Francois Turbot prepares to walk a tightrope between the top of the bridge and the lookout tower.

subTitle: In the aftermath of Indrajit's devastating attack, the vaanar army grapples with immense loss as the cost of war is laid bare. Hanuman embarks on a risky quest to save his comrades.

subTitle: Simar's parents are worried about Simar's proposal being accepted. Buaji mistakes Sankulp for Prem and tries to break the relationship. Prem meets the family and impresses them.

subTitle: Vivaan, Ranjana and her father are invited as esteemed guests to a Mata parade, where they bump into Chakor.

subTitle: Unable to bear Preeto's emotional fiasco's, Harman takes the decision of leaving the house with Soumya.

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Devika tries to sabotage Suman by keeping her from buying Diwali gifts for Chandrakant. When the time comes to exchange gifts, Suman realises she has nothing to give.

subTitle: Parineet spends time with Rajeev and shares happy moments with him. Parineet attempts suicide by slashing her wrists.

subTitle: Bulbul encounters several unexpected incidents during her first day at college. However, Veer feels anxious after learning about Bulbul's involvement in a college rally.
